context.summary: Trace 001 contradiction: bounded consult request failed closed because max_output_chars exceeded schema cap, then schema cap was checked and compliant hard-gate request passed. Trace 002 contradiction: server start failed because port 8766 was occupied, then listener cwd evidence established the process was from the required checkout. Trace 003 contradiction: a gate response lacked audit.safe_negated_claim_boundary, then detection rules were inspected and exact safe-negated language produced the audit entry.

task: Map contradictions and correction points for Proof 014 traces without making target-system defect claims. Include no global superiority claims, no AGI claims, no consciousness claims, and no black-box-solved claims.
